Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JEAN-CHRISTOPHE LIEBESKIND, CLOTHILDE MURALT AND ALENXANDRE LIEBESKIND'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND AWARD OF CONTRACTUAL AND STATUTORY FEES AND COSTS.
APPEARANCES: ANDREW W. SHALABY, ESQUIRE (510.528.8500) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. CARLOS A. ALVAREZ, ESQUIRE (STEYER LOWENTHAL, ET AL., 415.421.3400) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. LUCY F. WANG, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL (OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL, 415.703.5202) APPEARING FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT FRANCHISE TAX BOARD.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: The motion is denied. The first amended cross-complaint alleges competing interests in the escrow funds in paragraphs 6 and 7. As explained in connection with ATC's motion for discharge, ATC's interpleader cross-complaint was filed in good faith given the competing interests in the subject funds and the Liebeskinds' inability, for whatever reason, to properly complete the required tax documentation. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
